title: grok-agent.yaml
description: Official JSON Schema for grok-agent.yaml — defines persistent, stateful Grok agents with tool access, memory modes, and session limits. Compatible with grok-install.yaml@1.0+ and grok@2026.4+.

version.description: Semantic version of this agent configuration file.

author.description: X handle of the agent config owner, prefixed with '@'.

compatibility.description: Platform specs this file is tested and compatible with.

agents.description: Named agent definitions. Each key is the agent identifier used in '@grok spawn agent:<Name>' triggers.

additionalProperties.description: A single persistent Grok agent definition.

description.description: Human-readable explanation of the agent's purpose and domain expertise.

tools.description: List of tool identifiers the agent is permitted to invoke. Tool definitions live in grok-tools.yaml.

items.description: Tool identifier matching a key in the grok-tools.yaml tools registry.

memory.description: Memory persistence strategy for this agent across sessions.

max_turns_per_session.description: Maximum number of back-and-forth turns per session before the agent requires re-spawning.

auto_save_state.description: Automatically persist agent state to disk after every session. Only meaningful when memory is 'long_term'.

personality.description: Agent-level personality override. Overrides the global grok.personality setting.

system_prompt.description: Custom system prompt prepended to every agent session. Defines the agent's persona and operating rules.

permissions.description: Explicit capability grants required beyond standard read access.

rate_limit.description: Per-agent request throttling to prevent runaway automation.

requests_per_day.description: Maximum tool invocations per calendar day.

enabled.description: Whether this agent is active. Set to false to disable without removing the definition.

hub_card.description: Optional GrokHub registry metadata. When present and 'publish' is true, the agent is discoverable in the public GrokHub registry.

publish.description: Master switch. When false, the agent is private and not exposed by the GrokHub registry.

registry_name.description: Display name shown in the GrokHub registry listing.

model.description: Underlying Grok model the agent runs on.

github.description: Canonical source repository URL for this agent.

tags.description: Discoverability tags shown on the GrokHub listing. Lowercase, hyphen/underscore allowed.

safety_profile.description: Declared safety posture used for sandboxing and review routing.

permission_scopes.description: Capability grants the agent advertises to potential installers. Reuses the canonical permission enum.

install_command.description: Single-line command an end user runs to install this agent.

deploy_command.description: Single-line command an end user runs to deploy this agent.

stats.description: Public counters surfaced on the GrokHub listing.

downloads.description: Total install count across all versions.

stars.description: Total star count from GrokHub users.

forks.description: Total fork count from GrokHub users.

x_native_features.description: X-platform native capabilities this agent invokes.
